payload.answer: The input 'Sara is my niece' contradicts the existing fact 'Sara is my daughter'. These relationships are mutually exclusive. The existing fact is retained as the authoritative record.

entity_resolution.reason: Existing relationship (daughter) is more specific and direct than proposed relationship (niece). Daughter relationship is logically incompatible with niece relationship for the same person.

payload.intent: Classify relationship conflict between existing and new input facts

details: Conflict detected between input and existing memory
Existing fact preserved due to direct contradiction
New input rejected without modification to durable memory
Ambiguity preserved: no assumption made about intent behind conflicting input

repair_options: Clarify if there are two different people named Sara
Confirm the correct relationship and explicitly retract the incorrect one
Provide additional context explaining the relationship change
